# La Yaung Hub

> La Yaung Hub (La Yaung · လရောင်, meaning "moonlight") is an interactive, bilingual (Burmese & English) online exam-preparation platform for Myanmar students. It pairs short video lessons with hands-on practice mapped to the real GED, IGCSE (Cambridge) and Myanmar Grade 10–12 (matriculation) syllabus, plus feedback from qualified teachers.

## What it is
- **Audience:** Myanmar students preparing for the GED, IGCSE (Cambridge), or the Myanmar national curriculum (Grades 10–12).
- **Languages:** Fully bilingual — every concept is explained in Burmese first, then in the English exam language.
- **Method:** Watch a short lesson → practice with nine interactive activity types (multiple choice, true/false, ordering, flashcards, fill the blanks, mark the words, math input, matching, short answer) → track your gaps so each study session targets your weakest topic.
- **Teacher feedback:** Written answers are reviewed by qualified teachers, not only auto-graded.

## Why it exists
Quality exam prep in Myanmar is mostly English-only, private tutoring costs 50,000–150,000 MMK per subject per month, and scattered videos rarely map to what exams actually test. La Yaung Hub makes syllabus-aligned, bilingual prep affordable and measurable.

## Pricing
- **Free, forever:** the first lesson of every topic, all nine activity types, bilingual lessons, and basic progress tracking.
- **Premium (coming soon):** every lesson unlocked, teacher feedback on written work, full gap analysis and study plan, with lifetime early-bird pricing for beta members.

## Status
Beta launching 2026. Visitors can join the waitlist for early access.

## Curriculum coverage
- **IGCSE (Cambridge):** Maths, Science, Language Arts — past-paper-style questions and grade-boundary tracking.
- **GED:** all four modules (Mathematical Reasoning, Science, Social Studies, Reasoning Through Language Arts) with timed practice tests and readiness scoring.
- **Myanmar Grades 10–12:** aligned to national textbooks with bilingual explanations for matriculation exam preparation.
